title: The Underworld Stirs
description: On pages 2–4, this part follows Robin, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Sanji, Unknown person #3, Luffy as Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.
scene: Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: Robin! Chopper! Hide!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've seen him before. He's a god's knight.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They're immortal! We can't beat 'em!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: The Survivor of Ohara...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, I guess there were two of you, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For the children's sake, you've gotta stay hidden and wait for the right moment!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The Marines sure dropped the ball there...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gunko! You done rounding up the straw hats?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Are we bringing 'em back with us?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Summers, you dolt!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You know we aren't here to provoke straw hat luffy, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We are to carry out our mission and go back home.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: GRR... How dare they do that to Saul! And they took colon too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How could you let this happen, jinbe?! I thought we'd be good with you here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Quit making a racket! I'm trying to think...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I WONDER... How do we handle this ability???

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That lady is scary! I thought I was a goner!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hm, that woman... no, it couldn't be.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Gyaah! She's back!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: The zombie lady!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: GACK!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Brook!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You there.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your life will be devoted to making music for me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You belong to me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the?! She knows Brook's music?! No way!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's a celestial dragon... and a soul king fan?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That's one hell of a groupie!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hey, Gunk01! Cut that out!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm not in the motor to pick a fight with an emperor here either.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Let's finish the job!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Crisis through 31 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
